html:
Exclusive to:

“Strike terror into those pathetic organics with the Zaptrocuter.

WX-78 gave this drone the name of Jules.”

-

The Zaptrocuter is summoned and controlled by Zaptrocuter Controller. Every attack deals 30 Electric Damage within 1.5 Wall Units with a short delay.

Contents

  • 1 Controller
  • 2 Skins
  • 3 Assets
  • 4 Trivia

Controller

“SO MUCH TO ZAP, SO LITTLE TIME”

–wx78, when controller can be used

The Zaptrocuter Controller is an item that can only be crafted and used by WX-78 with the Telemechanical Enthusiast I skill. The Zaptrocuter Controller can be equipped to control a Zaptrocuter to attack a mob from distance.

Each attack uses 2% usage. With the Telemechanical Enthusiast II skill, each attack consumes 1% usage. Its durability can be fully restored by charging it at Winona's Generator, Winona's G.E.M.erator or a Lightning Rod that has been struck recently.

The control range of Zaptrocuter Controller is 15 Wall units (3.75 Tiles). With the Signal Booster skill, the distance is extended by 15 Wall units. With the Beta Circuits Tinkering I skill, plugging in each Rangebooster Circuit extends the distance by 5 Wall units.

While controlling the Zaptrocuter, the player cannot move. They can escape the control panel with ESC key or right click. Getting attacked will also exit the UI.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Woven - Distinguished
Jeweled Collection
Lacquered 'Lectrocuter Controller
An opulent interface befitting a mechanical overlord.
Woven - Distinguished
Gothic Collection
Gloomy Loomer Controller
Let the fleshlings feel watched, then shock them when they least expect it!

Exclusive to:
Zaptrocuter
Combat
30 ()
Miscellaneous
"wx78_drone_zap"
“It uses current technology.”
–Wilson
“I got my eye on you, zappy.”
–Willow
“Be careful not zap Wolfgang!”
–Wolfgang
“Feels impersonal.”
–Wendy
“GET 'EM, JULES”
–WX-78
“It permits the automaton to engage its foes from a distance.”
–Wickerbottom
“Look at that airborne menace, Luce!”
–Woodie
“I've got my eye on you!”
–Maxwell
“Rain lightening upön thy föes!”
–Wigfrid
“We don't like zaps.”
–Webber
“But can it fry an egg?”
–Warly
“Flying zapper friend”
–Wormwood
“I know who's really in control!”
–Winona
“It shoots lightning? How frightening!”
–Wortox
“Don't zap me, florp!”
–Wurt
“Stay out of its way, Woby!”
–Walter
“Mind where you're zapping!”
–Wanda
“Strike terror into those pathetic organics with the Zaptrocuter.
WX-78 gave this drone the name of Jules.”
-
The Zaptrocuter is summoned and controlled by Zaptrocuter Controller. Every attack deals 30 Electric Damage within 1.5 Wall Units with a short delay.

“It controls remotely? It's a.... Detached Telecommand Apparatus!”
–Wilson
“I don't trust WX with this thing.”
–Willow
“Robot have all the fun toy.”
–Wolfgang
“Are we all just being controlled?”
–Wendy
“INVALID CREDENTIALS”
–WX-78
“Through signal transmission, the automaton may maneuver the aerial device and discharge electrical shocks.”
–Wickerbottom
“Some sort of robot toy.”
–Woodie
“I didn't want to play with it anyway.”
–Maxwell
“By this, the Irön Lörd calls a Valkyrie fröm the heavens!”
–Wigfrid
“Can we have a turn?”
–Webber
“It is too fancy for me!”
–Warly
“Only robot friend play”
–Wormwood
“WX don't like sharin'.”
–Winona
“It won't respond to a non-automaton.”
–Wortox
“Ironfolk toy.”
–Wurt
“That's not a toy apparently.”
–Walter
“In the wrong hands... nevermind.”
–Wanda
“SO MUCH TO ZAP, SO LITTLE TIME”
–wx78, when controller can be used
The Zaptrocuter Controller is an item that can only be crafted and used by WX-78 with the Telemechanical Enthusiast I skill. The Zaptrocuter Controller can be equipped to control a Zaptrocuter to attack a mob from distance.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Zaptrocuter được triệu hồi và điều khiển bởi Zaptrocuter Controller. Mỗi đòn tấn công gây 30 sát thương điện trong phạm vi 1,5 đơn vị tường với độ trễ ngắn.
title: Zaptrocuter
